kinesis 0.0.0.9003

Plot UI

Source: R/plot.R
output_plot.Rd

Plot UI

Usage

output_plot(id, ..., tools = NULL, title = "Card title")

Arguments

id

A character vector to be used for the namespace.

...

Further parameters to be passed to shiny::plotOutput().

tools

A (list of) input elements.

See also

Other widgets: render_plot()

On this page

kinesis is a part of the tesselle project, a collection of packages for research and teaching in archaeology. Learn more at tesselle.org.

Developed by Nicolas Frerebeau, , .
